title: ED minor head injury documentation
source_review_basis: committed exact-section summaries and evidence records; full guideline documents were not retained for this pass

red_flags.text: Supports mechanism and time, loss of consciousness, headache, nausea or vomiting, dizziness, blurred vision, amnesia or confusion, medication and bleeding-risk review, vital signs, Glasgow Coma Scale, pupils, neurological screen, scalp, and neck documentation.
red_flags.rationale: The exact DHA section supports onset, mechanism, severity, associated symptoms, relevant negatives, risk context, vital data, focused examination and appearance only when assessed; it does not classify injury severity automatically.
red_flags.evidence_extract: Supports mechanism and time, loss of consciousness, headache, nausea or vomiting, dizziness, blurred vision, amnesia or confusion, medication and bleeding-risk review, vital signs, Glasgow Coma Scale, pupils, neurological screen, scalp, and neck documentation.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Minor Head Injury

red_flags.text: Lists loss of consciousness, seizure, repeated vomiting, drowsiness, worsening headache, amnesia, focal neurological or balance or speech or vision changes, skull or penetrating injury, bleeding disorder or anticoagulant use, intoxication, and non-accidental injury concerns.
red_flags.rationale: The exact red-flag section supports recording time-critical symptoms only when clinician-assessed.
red_flags.evidence_extract: Lists loss of consciousness, seizure, repeated vomiting, drowsiness, worsening headache, amnesia, focal neurological or balance or speech or vision changes, skull or penetrating injury, bleeding disorder or anticoagulant use, intoxication, and non-accidental injury concerns.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Minor Head Injury

red_flags.text: Supports clinician-determined CT, MRI, or X-ray documentation and immediate referral or escalation when serious-injury criteria are present.
red_flags.rationale: The exact investigations and referral section supports recording existing imaging or tests, escalation and specialist discussion only when performed or decided.
red_flags.evidence_extract: Supports clinician-determined CT, MRI, or X-ray documentation and immediate referral or escalation when serious-injury criteria are present.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Minor Head Injury

medication.text: Supports clinician-documented observation, head-injury advice, analgesia decisions, worsening-symptom return precautions, and arranged follow-up without fixed routine timing or doses.
medication.rationale: The exact observation section supports recording a clinician plan and arranged handover or follow-up only when completed; no duration or instruction is generated.
medication.evidence_extract: Supports clinician-documented observation, head-injury advice, analgesia decisions, worsening-symptom return precautions, and arranged follow-up without fixed routine timing or doses.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Minor Head Injury

exact_section.heading: Sections 8–9 — observation, advice, return precautions, and follow-up

sources_used.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Minor Head Injury

source_limitations: Loss of consciousness, amnesia, vomiting, seizure, anticoagulants, intoxication, Glasgow Coma Scale, skull signs, neurological detail, CT criteria, diagnosis, treatment and disposition remain unsupported.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
All prior supported legacy-item mappings were removed because canonical item-level applicability and workflow-specific rationale were not present in explicit repository records.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
